cases.prompt: Pair agent with my browser so another agent can use it.

assertions.text: The skill pairs a remote AI agent with the user's browser.
The skill produces a setup key and connection instructions for the remote agent.

cases.prompt: 내 브라우저 공유해서 원격 에이전트가 쓸 수 있게 해줘.

assertions.text: The skill shares the user's browser with a remote agent.
The remote agent receives its own tab with scoped access.
The skill provides connection instructions for the remote agent to join.

cases.prompt: Give browser access to a Codex agent running remotely.

assertions.text: The skill grants the remote Codex agent access to the browser.
The setup supports remote agents such as OpenClaw, Hermes, Codex, or Cursor.
